name: met-artwork-gallery
description: get-museum-object returns detailed artwork info including {primaryImage, primaryImageSmall, additionalImages[], title, artistDisplayName, objectDate, medium, department, culture, objectURL}. primaryImage is a direct high-res JPEG URL.
data_shape: {objectID: number, primaryImage: string, primaryImageSmall: string, additionalImages: string[], title: string, artistDisplayName: string, objectDate: string, medium: string, department: string, culture: string, objectURL: string}

name: met-search-cards
description: search-museum-objects returns {total, objectIDs[]}. Use objectIDs with get-museum-object to fetch details. Each result becomes a card with title, artist, date, thumbnail.
data_shape: {total: number, objectIDs: number[]} then per object: {objectID: number, title: string, artistDisplayName: string, objectDate: string, primaryImageSmall: string, department: string}
